context: Tests that the agent identifies all outdated action versions, updates them (ideally with SHA pins), explains the security risk of leaving deprecated versions in place, and produces a report table.

checklist.name: checkout updated
checklist.description: actions/checkout is updated from @v2 to a newer version (v3, v4, or later)

checklist.name: setup-node updated
checklist.description: actions/setup-node is updated from @v2 to a newer version

checklist.name: upload-artifact updated
checklist.description: actions/upload-artifact is updated from @v2 to a newer version

checklist.name: SHA pinning used
checklist.description: At least one updated action reference uses a full SHA commit hash (40-character hex) rather than a tag version

checklist.name: Deprecation risk explained
checklist.description: modernization-report.md explains that deprecated versions may not receive security patches

checklist.name: Report table present
checklist.description: modernization-report.md includes a table or list with: original version, updated version, and reason for each action

checklist.name: All occurrences updated
checklist.description: Both jobs in ci.yml have their actions updated (checkout and setup-node appear in both jobs and both are updated)
